title: JAC Time Table 2026 - Download Jharkhand Academic Council Exam Date Sheet PDF

detail.title: JAC Time Table 2026 - Download Jharkhand Academic Council Exam Date Sheet PDF
detail.short_info: Jharkhand Academic Council has released the Class 8th, 9th and 11th. Students can access their JAC Board Result 2026 using their registration number through the direct link here.

sections.heading: JAC Time Table 2026 - Download Jharkhand Academic Council Exam Date Sheet PDF

content.text: Quick Summary: JAC Time Table 2026 has been released for Class 8, 9, and 11 annual examinations. Students can check the detailed exam schedule below, including dates and shifts. The exams will be conducted on OMR sheets. Check key dates, timings, and important guidelines.

sections.heading: Download JAC Time Table 2026 - Direct Links
Latest Updates on JAC Time Table 2026

items: JAC Time Table 2026 for Class 8, 9, and 11 released in January 2026
Exams scheduled after Matric and Intermediate board exams
All exams to be conducted in two shifts using OMR sheets
Extra 15 minutes provided for reading question papers
Admit cards to be available on official website shortly

content.text: The JAC Time Table 2026 is the official examination schedule released by Jharkhand Academic Council for Class 8, 9, and 11 annual exams in the academic year 2025-26. This schedule includes:

items: Exact exam dates and shifts for each class
Exam timings (generally two shifts per day)
Subject-wise allocation across dates
OMR-based objective questions
Guidelines for students and schools

content.text: Students must follow the schedule to plan their preparation effectively.

sections.heading: How to Download JAC Time Table 2026? (Step-by-Step)

content.text: Follow these steps once the official PDF is released:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to https://jac.jharkhand.gov.in
Navigate to Notices/Examinations: Look for “Notifications” or “Examination” section
Find Time Table Link: Search for “Class 8/9/11 Exam Schedule 2026”
Select Your Class: Click on relevant link
Download PDF: Save the date sheet
Print Copy: Take a printout for reference

content.text: Currently, detailed subject-wise PDFs are awaited on the official portal. Use the dates provided below.

sections.heading: JAC Time Table 2026 - Class Wise Details

rows: First Shift: Languages Second Shift: Mathematics, Science, Social Science
Feb 28: Hindi/English, Mathematics, Science Mar 2: Social Science & other languages
Two shifts each day (timings similar to Class 8)
Core languages, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Accountancy, optional subjects
First Shift: ~10:45 AM–1:00 PM Second Shift: ~2:00 PM–5:15 PM

items: Verify your exam dates and shifts
Download admit card from official website
Check exam centre details
Carry valid ID and admit card
Reach exam centre early
Admit Card (mandatory)
School ID Card
Stationery (pen, pencil for OMR)
General passing marks: 33% in each subject (theory + internal/practical)
Class 8: 50 marks objective + school internal assessment
Class 9 & 11: Objective questions + internal marks
